matched_comparators.name: Raw OCR text prompt
matched_comparators.notes: No sanitization is applied after OCR extraction.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + regex masking
matched_comparators.notes: Mask numeric identifiers and payment-style patterns with OCR-text regexes only.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + generic de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Mask regex hits plus generic receipt header and contact-like text spans without policy routing.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + Presidio receipt de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Use a real Presidio recognizer stack plus receipt-specific recognizers and line expansion on OCR text.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + spaCy receipt de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Use a spaCy NER stack plus receipt-specific line expansion on OCR text.

matched_comparators.name: Proposed multimodal mediation
matched_comparators.notes: Mask receipt-item and payment-sensitive spans with layout-aware heuristics while preserving summary totals.

mapping_notes: Receipt item-name fields and card/e-money payment fields are treated as the protected receipt-privacy slice.
Aggregate subtotal and total lines remain utility-carrying content and are not designated as protected gold spans here.
Gold spans are matched to OCR detections via box overlap so the evaluation remains grounded in the OCR transcript rather than in raw annotation text offsets.
